intro-001.name: Claim Your Swag Bag
intro-001.description: Head to the Pet Store and hatch your 4 free starter pets.

objectives.description: Hatch 4 free pets at the Pet Store

dialogue.start: The Pet Store's got 4 free eggs for newcomers. Go hatch yourself a team.
dialogue.progress: Still only {current}/{total} pets? The store's right there.
dialogue.complete: Not bad. Enjoy a hit of dopamine? Head to the Guard Barracks and check the notice board for more.

intro-002.name: The Guard's Request
intro-002.description: Visit the Guard Barracks in town.

dialogue.start: The guards might have something for you. Head to the barracks.
dialogue.progress: The barracks is inside the town. Look for the big stone building.
dialogue.complete: Good, you found the place. The captain says to check back when you're stronger.

intro-003.name: Rock Bottom
intro-003.description: Mine 10 ores at the Mining Camp.

dialogue.start: Every adventurer needs resources. Head to the Mining Camp and dig up 10 ores.
dialogue.complete: You've got dirt under your fingernails. I respect that.

intro-004.name: Something's Fishy
intro-004.description: Catch 10 fish at the Fishing Dock.

dialogue.start: The dock master needs help. Go catch 10 fish — any kind will do.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} fish caught. The gulls are jealous.
dialogue.complete: Not bad for a landlubber. Here's your reward.

intro-005.name: Timber!
intro-005.description: Chop 10 logs at the Lumber Forest.

dialogue.start: The carpenter is screaming about a wood shortage. Cut down 10 logs.
dialogue.complete: The carpenter can stop screaming now. Well done.

dialogue.start: Time to put those ores to use. Head to the Smithy and smelt 5 bars.
dialogue.complete: A smith in the making. JackTown needs more like you.

fetch-001.name: The Blacksmith's Hamster
fetch-001.description: The blacksmith needs 10 copper ore... for his pet hamster's cage. Don't ask.

dialogue.start: Look, my hamster is very particular about his living arrangements. Just get me the ore.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} copper ore. My hamster is getting impatient.
dialogue.complete: Perfect. Mr. Whiskers will be thrilled. Here, take this.

fetch-002.name: Questionable Fish Stew
fetch-002.description: The tavern cook needs 15 fish for a stew. The health inspector would not approve.

dialogue.start: The tavern needs fish for tonight's stew. Any fish. ALL the fish. Don't ask about the recipe.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} fish. The pot is simmering ominously.
dialogue.complete: Brilliant. The stew is... well, it's something. Here's your coin.

skill-001.name: Apprentice Miner
skill-001.description: Reach level 10 in Mining to prove your worth.

dialogue.start: The mining guild only accepts level 10 miners. Time to put in the work.
dialogue.progress: Current level: {current}. Target: {total}. Keep at it.
dialogue.complete: Level 10! The guild recognizes your skill. Welcome, apprentice.

dialogue.start: The dungeons are crawling with creatures. Show them who's boss.
dialogue.complete: A capable fighter. The kingdom takes notice.

dialogue.start: The Verdant Caves are the easiest dungeon. Prove you can handle it.
dialogue.complete: The slimes never stood a chance.

combat-003.name: Dungeon Delver II
combat-003.description: Clear the Ember Depths and Sunken Grotto.

dialogue.start: Two more dungeons await. Fire and water — can you handle both?
dialogue.complete: Impressive range. Fire and water both bow to you.

combat-004.name: Dungeon Delver III
combat-004.description: Clear the Shadow Crypt and Circuit Lab.

dialogue.start: The deeper dungeons are no joke. Shadow and tech await.
dialogue.complete: You've conquered shadow and machine alike.

combat-005.name: Dungeon Delver IV
combat-005.description: Clear the Enchanted Ruins, Volcanic Core, and Abyssal Depths.

dialogue.start: The final three original dungeons. Only the best survive.
dialogue.complete: A true dungeon master. The kingdom salutes you.

dialogue.start: The Training Arena is open. Win 5 fights to earn some respect.
dialogue.complete: Not bad for a rookie. The crowd wants more.

dialogue.start: Winning is easy. Winning five in a row? That takes skill.
dialogue.progress: Current streak doesn't count. You need 5 consecutive.
dialogue.complete: Five straight wins! The arena echoes with your name.

dialogue.start: Twenty-five consecutive victories. Think you have what it takes?
dialogue.progress: Not there yet. One loss resets the count.
dialogue.complete: Twenty-five! You are the undisputed Arena Champion!

dialogue.start: The dungeons are endless. Slay 50 creatures to prove your worth.
dialogue.complete: Fifty down. The dungeon floors are painted with your victories.

dialogue.start: Two hundred kills. A true warlord's number.
dialogue.complete: Two hundred. They write songs about numbers like that.

dialogue.start: Bosses are the real challenge. Topple five of them.
dialogue.complete: Five boss kills! You're hunting the hunters now.

dialogue.start: A frozen wasteland awaits beyond the abyss. The Ice Wyrm hungers.
dialogue.progress: The cold bites deep. Press on.
dialogue.complete: The Ice Wyrm falls! The frozen wastes thaw under your might.

dialogue.start: The Crucible awaits. Ten waves. Every element. One chance.
dialogue.progress: The champion still stands. Try again.
dialogue.complete: THE CRUCIBLE IS CONQUERED! You are legend.

board-f01.name: Copper Run
board-f01.description: The bartender needs copper for... plumbing, apparently.

dialogue.start: Don't ask what the copper's for. Just get it.
dialogue.complete: Good. The pipes will live another day.

board-f02.name: Fish Fry Friday
board-f02.description: The kitchen is running low. Every day is Fish Fry Friday here.

dialogue.start: We need fish. The regulars get violent without their fish stew.
dialogue.complete: That should keep 'em fed. Barely.

board-f03.name: Firewood Detail
board-f03.description: The hearth won't feed itself. Chop some logs.

dialogue.start: Fireplace is dying. Get me some wood before the patrons freeze.
dialogue.complete: Finally, some warmth. Take your coin.

board-f04.name: Ore Haul
board-f04.description: A merchant left a standing order for raw ore. Any type.

dialogue.start: Some merchant wants ore. Don't care what kind. Just get 25.
dialogue.complete: Merchant's happy. You're paid. Everyone wins.

board-f05.name: Crimson Request
board-f05.description: A regular patron insists on Crimson Ore for her 'art project.'

dialogue.start: Lady in the corner wants crimson ore. Something about pigments. Sure.
dialogue.complete: She seems delighted. Artists, am I right?

board-f06.name: The Big Catch
board-f06.description: A travelling chef needs a massive haul of fish.

dialogue.start: Chef's in town. Wants thirty fish. I don't question it.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} fish. The chef's knife is already out.
dialogue.complete: The chef's ecstatic. Here's your share.

board-f07.name: Lumber Surplus
board-f07.description: The carpenter's apprentice lost a shipment. Replace it.

dialogue.start: Apprentice lost the lumber. Classic. Replace it before the master notices.
dialogue.complete: Crisis averted. The apprentice owes you one.

board-f08.name: Gold Rush
board-f08.description: A jeweler needs Gold Ore for a special commission.

dialogue.start: Jeweler wants gold ore. Twenty pieces. Pay's decent.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} gold ore. The jeweler's getting anxious.
dialogue.complete: Shiny. The jeweler's already drooling. Here's your cut.

board-f09.name: Stockpile
board-f09.description: The tavern cellar needs restocking. Ore, fish, AND logs.

dialogue.start: Cellar's barren. We need ore AND fish. Big order, big pay.
dialogue.progress: Still working? The cellar's not gonna fill itself.
dialogue.complete: Cellar's stocked. The Rusty Tankard lives another week.

board-f10.name: Smelter's Dozen
board-f10.description: The smithy's forge has gone cold. Deliver bars to reignite production.

dialogue.start: Smithy needs bars. Twelve of 'em. Any kind. Make it happen.
dialogue.complete: The forge burns bright again. Good work.

board-f11.name: Deep Vein Extraction
board-f11.description: The mining guild wants rare ores from deeper deposits.

dialogue.start: Mining guild's offering a bounty for serious excavation. Sixty ores.
dialogue.complete: Sixty ores! The guild tips their helmets to you.

board-f12.name: Feast Preparation
board-f12.description: A noble's banquet requires fish and logs for the outdoor grill.

dialogue.start: Some noble wants a feast. Fish, wood — the works. Pay's royal.
dialogue.progress: The banquet won't prep itself. Keep going.
dialogue.complete: The noble is pleased. You may never eat this well yourself, but hey — coin.

board-c01.name: Pest Control
board-c01.description: Clear vermin from the tunnels beneath the tavern.

dialogue.start: Something's living under the floorboards. Kill twenty of whatever it is.
dialogue.complete: The scratching stopped. I owe you a drink. Figuratively.

board-c02.name: Arena Warm-Up
board-c02.description: The arena master wants fresh blood. Win some fights.

dialogue.start: Arena's quiet today. Go win ten fights, liven things up.
dialogue.complete: The crowd roars! Here, the arena master sent your cut.

board-c03.name: Dungeon Patrol
board-c03.description: The guard captain wants the caves swept. Slay 50 creatures.

dialogue.start: Captain wants the dungeon thinned out. Fifty kills oughta do it.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} enemies slain. The dungeons are still crawling.
dialogue.complete: Fifty down. The captain nods approvingly. Rare for him.

board-c04.name: Boss Bounty
board-c04.description: A bounty's been posted for dungeon bosses. Collect their heads.

dialogue.start: Bounty board says three boss heads. Pays well if you survive.
dialogue.complete: Three heads! I'm both impressed and slightly disturbed.

board-h01.name: The Long Haul
board-h01.description: A serious commission: massive resource gathering across all skills.

dialogue.start: Big contract. Three resources, big quantities. Only serious adventurers.
dialogue.progress: This is a marathon, not a sprint. Keep grinding.
dialogue.complete: Incredible. You actually finished. I underestimated you.

board-h02.name: Slaughter Order
board-h02.description: An anonymous client wants 100 dungeon creatures eliminated.

dialogue.start: Anonymous note on the board: 100 kills + 5 bosses. Big money. Suspicious? Yes.
dialogue.progress: The anonymous client is watching. Somehow.
dialogue.complete: Contract fulfilled. The coin appeared overnight. Don't ask.

board-u01.name: Unbreakable
board-u01.description: Win 25 arena fights in a row without a single loss.

dialogue.start: Twenty-five consecutive wins. I've never seen anyone do it. Prove me wrong.
dialogue.progress: One loss and it's over. No pressure.
dialogue.complete: You absolute madlad. TWENTY-FIVE. Drinks are on the house. Just this once.

board-u02.name: The Crucible Challenge
board-u02.description: Clear The Crucible dungeon. Ten waves. Every element. No mercy.

dialogue.start: The Crucible. The hardest dungeon known to exist. You won't survive.
dialogue.complete: You... cleared The Crucible?! I need to sit down. Here's everything I've got.
